plugins.name: engineering-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Skills for common software engineering workflows including git operations, test fixing, code review implementation, and feature planning with plan-implementer agent

plugins.name: visual-documentation-skills
plugins.description: Skills for creating stunning visual HTML documentation with modern UI design, SVG diagrams, flowcharts, dashboards, timelines, and technical documentation

plugins.name: productivity-skills
plugins.description: Productivity and workflow optimization skills for analyzing usage patterns, auditing code, bootstrapping projects, and generating documentation

plugins.name: code-operations-skills
plugins.description: High-precision code manipulation operations including line-based insertion, bulk refactoring, and file analysis - converted from code-copy-mcp

plugins.name: sigil
plugins.description: Certification authority for Claude Code skills. Multi-perspective review engine spawning expert agents (Engineering, Security, UX, CEO/Strategy, QA) to audit codebases, designs, and skills. Emits structured certificates with evidence markers and SHA-256 digests. The quality gate for AI skills marketplaces.

plugins.name: 360-review-skills
plugins.description: Multi-perspective 360 review that generates 100 balanced user stories (50 positive, 50 negative) across 5 expert lenses. Applies to any codebase, skill, design doc, or idea. Every claim has evidence markers.

plugins.name: sigil-engineering-workflow
plugins.description: Prompt-driven engineering workflow skills: plan-execute, test-doctor, safe-commit, review-apply, solution-ensemble. Language-aware, security-scanned, smoke-checked.
